name: @grethel-labs/excaliplant
description: PlantUML → ELK layout → Excalidraw renderer with a plugin-based parser.

scripts.test: node --test tests/edge_cases.test.mjs tests/functional_more.test.mjs tests/merge_driver.test.mjs tests/modular_architecture.test.mjs tests/plantuml.test.mjs tests/security.test.mjs tests/self_introspection.test.mjs tests/module_coverage.test.mjs tests/sequence_components.test.mjs tests/class_components.test.mjs tests/component_components.test.mjs tests/deployment_components.test.mjs tests/usecase_components.test.mjs tests/object_components.test.mjs tests/state_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/timing/tests/timing_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/regex/tests/regex_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/ebnf/tests/ebnf_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/json/tests/json_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/yaml/tests/yaml_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/math/tests/math_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/nwdiag/tests/nwdiag_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/salt/tests/salt_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/archimate/tests/archimate_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/gantt/tests/gantt_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/mindmap/tests/mindmap_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/wbs/tests/wbs_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/chronology/tests/chronology_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/files/tests/files_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/ie/tests/ie_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/chen/tests/chen_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/ditaa/tests/ditaa_components.test.mjs src/diagrams/chart/tests/chart_components.test.mjs tests/style.test.mjs
scripts.build: npm run test && npm run build:docs && npm run build:api && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/prepublish-guard.mjs && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run build
